# Scene codex

Per-theme tier resolution for every Scene slot, plus shipped-resource counts and
multi-flavor variant flags. Generated by walking each bundle's decoded manifest.

See [docs/scene-slot-spec.md](./scene-slot-spec.md) for the hand-authored contract behind each slot.

## Tier distribution per slot

### Info-bar background  `info-bar-bg`

Resolved in: `demo/index.html buildScene`

| Tier | Field | Why | Themes |
|---|---|---|---|
| T1 | `cinf bgPattern` | finder-header cinf -9567 carries the scheme-author-declared bgPatternId | 1990, animals, crayon-os, evolution, monkey-paradise |
| T2 | `bodyBackground` | cinf -9551 (Icon View) bgPatternId — the body texture, used as a substitute | 1984, dolphin-som, floppies |
| T3 | `headerFill` | solid colour from the active title-bar fill — for schemes shipping no ppat | 1138, apple-lisa, apple-platinum-2, beos-r503, black-platinum, platinum-8, slimes, system7-nostalgia-silver, windows-31, windows-95 |
| T4 | `flat #e6e6e6` | hard fallback | — |

### Volume icon (info-bar leading slot)  `volume-icon`

Resolved in: `demo/index.html gridProxyIcon`

| Tier | Field | Why | Themes |
|---|---|---|---|
| T1 | `ics4/8 -3790` | Mac OS volume info icon — the canonical Finder slot for this position | 1138, 1984, 1990, animals, apple-lisa, beos-r503, black-platinum, crayon-os, dolphin-som, evolution, monkey-paradise, windows-31, windows-95 |
| T2 | `ics4/8 -14336` | document-window collapse widget — schemes that don't theme -3790 typically draw their mark here | apple-platinum-2, floppies, platinum-8, slimes, system7-nostalgia-silver |
| T3 | `FINDER_GRID_PNG` | sliced from the reference screenshot — neutral fallback | — |

### Window body background  `window-body-bg`

Resolved in: `src/renderWindow.ts bodyBackgroundStyle`

| Tier | Field | Why | Themes |
|---|---|---|---|
| T1 | `bodyBackground` | cinf -9551 bgPatternId — the Icon View body texture | 1984, 1990, animals, crayon-os, dolphin-som, evolution, floppies, monkey-paradise |
| T2 | `white` | classic Mac default | 1138, apple-lisa, apple-platinum-2, beos-r503, black-platinum, platinum-8, slimes, system7-nostalgia-silver, windows-31, windows-95 |

### Desktop background (Scene canvas)  `desktop-bg`

Resolved in: `demo/index.html buildScene desk`

| Tier | Field | Why | Themes |
|---|---|---|---|
| T1 | `desktop-pattern key` | first pattern whose key matches /desktop/i — what 1138/1984/beos ship explicitly | 1138, 1984, apple-lisa, beos-r503 |
| T2 | `ppat-17 (canonical Mac desktop)` | Apple-reserved id 17 is the system Finder built-in desktop pattern — 5 themes ship it | 1990, animals, dolphin-som, evolution, monkey-paradise, windows-31, windows-95 |
| T3 | `CSS checkerboard` | fallback for schemes that ship neither (apple-platinum-2 / Platinums / Windows ports) | apple-platinum-2, black-platinum, crayon-os, floppies, platinum-8, slimes, system7-nostalgia-silver |

### Dialog / utility window body background  `dialog-body-bg`

Resolved in: `src/renderWindow.ts bodyBackgroundStyle (utility-slug branch)`

| Tier | Field | Why | Themes |
|---|---|---|---|
| T1 | `flat #ffffff` | period-faithful modal/utility body fill — every theme lands here | 1138, 1984, 1990, animals, apple-lisa, apple-platinum-2, beos-r503, black-platinum, crayon-os, dolphin-som, evolution, floppies, monkey-paradise, platinum-8, slimes, system7-nostalgia-silver, windows-31, windows-95 |

### Info-bar volume-label text color  `info-bar-text-color`

Resolved in: `demo/index.html buildScene volume span`

| Tier | Field | Why | Themes |
|---|---|---|---|
| T1 | `contrast-pick` | sample the resolved info-bar bg luminance + pick #fff / #000 for contrast — always available | 1138, 1984, 1990, animals, apple-lisa, apple-platinum-2, beos-r503, black-platinum, crayon-os, dolphin-som, evolution, floppies, monkey-paradise, platinum-8, slimes, system7-nostalgia-silver, windows-31, windows-95 |
| T2 | `flat #000` | hardcoded fallback — illegible on dark info bars | — |

### Progress-bar accent hue  `progress-bar-hue`

Resolved in: `src/controls.ts composeProgress (currently always lavender / role-3-part)`

| Tier | Field | Why | Themes |
|---|---|---|---|
| T1 | `lavender 2-part canonical` | shipped -10223 — the kDEF default lavender progress (composeProgress checks this first) | animals, apple-platinum-2, beos-r503, black-platinum, monkey-paradise, platinum-8, slimes, system7-nostalgia-silver |
| T2 | `role-3-part frame/fill/track` | schemes shipping -10080/-10079/-10078 carry the artist-painted progress bar; runtime fallback when -10223 absent | 1138, 1984, 1990, apple-lisa, crayon-os, dolphin-som, evolution, floppies, windows-31, windows-95 |
| T3 | `multi-hue` | scheme ships 3+ alternate hues — runtime could expose a picker, currently picks default | — |
| T4 | `procedural Platinum` | no progress cicn → platinumProgress fallback | — |

### Folder/scene icons inside the body  `folder-scene-icons`

Resolved in: `demo/index.html schemeIcons`

| Tier | Field | Why | Themes |
|---|---|---|---|
| T1 | `FINDER_CONTENT_ICON_IDS (folder-priority)` | standard folder ids the Mac always shipped: -3983 System / -3999 Generic / -3997 Open / … | 1138, 1984, 1990, animals, apple-lisa, beos-r503, black-platinum, crayon-os, dolphin-som, evolution, floppies, monkey-paradise, platinum-8, slimes, windows-31, windows-95 |
| T2 | `coverage-ranked icl4/8` | any 32px scene icon with 18–95% coverage when no folder id was hit | apple-platinum-2, system7-nostalgia-silver |
| T3 | `neutral SVG folders` | fall-through — schemes that theme no folders at all (1990, apple-platinum-2) | — |

| windows-31 | 11 | 229 | 226 | 212 |
| windows-95 | 26 | 245 | 232 | 214 |

## Multi-flavor / variant flags

### Progress-bar hue variants  `progress-hues`

Some 1998–2000 schemes shipped a hue picker; cicns at -10071..-10080 / -10220..-10222 are the alternate fills

| theme | variant evidence |
|---|---|
| 1138 | -10075, -10076, -10077, -10078, -10079, -10080 |
| 1984 | -10075, -10076, -10077, -10078, -10079, -10080 |
| 1990 | -10075, -10076, -10077, -10078, -10079, -10080 |
| apple-lisa | -10078, -10079, -10080 |
| apple-platinum-2 | -10071, -10072, -10073, -10074, -10075, -10076, -10077, -10078, -10079, -10080, -10220, -10221, -10222 |
| black-platinum | -10071, -10072, -10073, -10074, -10075, -10076, -10077, -10078, -10079, -10080, -10220, -10221, -10222 |
| crayon-os | -10075, -10076, -10077, -10078, -10079, -10080 |
| dolphin-som | -10075, -10076, -10077, -10078, -10079, -10080 |
| evolution | -10075, -10076, -10077, -10078, -10079, -10080 |
| floppies | -10075, -10076, -10077, -10078, -10079, -10080 |
| platinum-8 | -10078, -10220, -10221, -10222 |
| system7-nostalgia-silver | -10071, -10072, -10073, -10074, -10075, -10076, -10077, -10078, -10079, -10080, -10220, -10221, -10222 |
| windows-31 | -10075, -10076, -10077, -10078, -10079, -10080 |
| windows-95 | -10075, -10076, -10077, -10078, -10079, -10080 |

### Sequential positive-id ppats  `numbered-ppats`

Positive-id ppat triples/quads with no slug are typically a scheme author's authored color variants

| theme | variant evidence |
|---|---|
| monkey-paradise | runs 128..130 (3) |

### headerColors active/inactive pair  `header-state-variants`

Every themed scheme should have BOTH; an asymmetry flags an incomplete theme

| theme | variant evidence |
